name_cn:
Black crocodile gold buckle·
CASSANDRE _Chain Bag A super practical small bag, Italian imported original crocodile cowhide, full leather inside and out. Classic metal logo highlights personality, flip-top design ensures security. Removable shoulder strap, bag features ten card slots, one bill compartment, two compartments, one zippered interior pocket, fits everything!
Model: 743364
Size: 23x14x3cm
Shoulder strap length: 47cm
